1799 // Token: 0x060002AA RID: 682 RVA: 0x0003FC9C File Offset: 0x0003DE9C
1800 private static void SendPacket(byte[] data, int remoteClient)
1801 {
1802 try
1803 {
1804 ushort num = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, 0);
1805 byte b = data[2];
1806 NetMessage.buffer[remoteClient].spamCount++;

1808 if (!Main.dedServ)
1809 {
1810 Netplay.Connection.Socket.AsyncSend(data, 0, (int)num, new SocketSendCallback(Netplay.Connection.ClientWriteCallBack), null);
1811 }
1812 else
1813 {
1814 Netplay.Clients[remoteClient].Socket.AsyncSend(data, 0, (int)num, new SocketSendCallback(Netplay.Clients[remoteClient].ServerWriteCallBack), null);
1815 }
1816 }
1817 catch
1818 {
1819 bool dedServ = Main.dedServ;
1820 }
1821 }

1824 public static void SendChestContentsTo(int chest, int targetPlayer)

1828 {
1829 NetMessage.TrySendData(32, targetPlayer, -1, null, chest, (float)i, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
1830 }
1831 }

1833 // Token: 0x060002AC RID: 684 RVA: 0x0003FDAC File Offset: 0x0003DFAC
1834 private static void WriteAccessoryVisibility(BinaryWriter writer, bool[] hideVisibleAccessory)

1840 {

2331 tile.frameY = reader.ReadInt16();

2342 }

2344 {

2360 {
2361 if (b5 == 2)

2369 }

2372 {
2373 if ((b2 & 2) == 2)

2378 {
2379 tile.wire2(true);
2380 }

2391 }

2396 }

2399 {

2417 }

2419 {

2423 }
2424 if ((b3 & 4) == 4)
2425 {
2426 tile.invisibleWall(true);
2427 }
2428 if ((b3 & 8) == 8)
2429 {
2430 tile.fullbrightBlock(true);
2431 }

2433 {

2436 }

2439 {

2441 }

2451 }
2452 }

2455 {
2456 short num4 = reader.ReadInt16();

2458 short num6 = reader.ReadInt16();

2461 {
2462 Chest.CreateWorldChest((int)num4, (int)num5, (int)num6).name = text;
2463 }
2464 }

2467 {
2468 short num7 = reader.ReadInt16();

2487 }
2488 MapUpdateQueue.Add(new Rectangle(xStart, yStart, width, height));

2511 }
2512 else
2513 {

2529 {

2532 }
2533 if (!NetMessage.buffer[bufferIndex].checkBytes)

2535 return;

2538 lock (messageBuffer)

2563 }

2570 i = 0;
2571 num = 0;

2574 {

2576 {
2577 NetMessage.buffer[bufferIndex].readBuffer[j] = NetMessage.buffer[bufferIndex].readBuffer[j + num];

2716 // Token: 0x060002C0 RID: 704 RVA: 0x00041170 File Offset: 0x0003F370
2717 private static void ResyncTiles(int clientId, Rectangle area)
2718 {
2719 for (int i = area.Left; i < area.Right; i += 200)
2720 {
2721 for (int j = area.Top; j < area.Bottom; j += 150)
2722 {
2723 NetMessage.SendData(10, clientId, -1, null, i, (float)j, (float)Math.Min(area.Right - i, 200), (float)Math.Min(area.Bottom - j, 150), 0, 0, 0);
2724 }
2725 }
2726 }

2728 // Token: 0x060002C1 RID: 705 RVA: 0x000411F0 File Offset: 0x0003F3F0
2729 public static void SendSection(int whoAmi, int sectionX, int sectionY)
2730 {

2732 {
2733 return;
2734 }
2735 try
2736 {
2737 if (sectionX >= 0 && sectionY >= 0 && sectionX < Main.maxSectionsX && sectionY < Main.maxSectionsY)
2738 {
2739 if (!Netplay.Clients[whoAmi].TileSections[sectionX, sectionY])
2740 {
2741 Netplay.Clients[whoAmi].TileSections[sectionX, sectionY] = true;
2742 int num = sectionX * 200;
2743 int num2 = sectionY * 150;
2744 int num3 = 150;
2745 for (int i = num2; i < num2 + 150; i += num3)
2746 {
2747 NetMessage.SendData(10, whoAmi, -1, null, num, (float)i, 200f, (float)num3, 0, 0, 0);
2748 }
2749 NetMessage.SyncNPCsForSection(whoAmi, sectionX, sectionY);
2750 NetMessage.SyncChestContentsForSection(whoAmi, sectionX, sectionY);
2751 }
2752 }
2753 }
2754 catch
2755 {
2756 }
2757 }
2758
2759 // Token: 0x060002C2 RID: 706 RVA: 0x000412B0 File Offset: 0x0003F4B0
2760 private static void SyncChestContentsForSection(int whoAmi, int sectionX, int sectionY)
2761 {
2762 for (int i = 0; i < 8000; i++)
2763 {
2764 Chest chest = Main.chest[i];
2765 if (chest != null)
2766 {
2767 int sectionX2 = Netplay.GetSectionX(chest.x);
2768 int sectionY2 = Netplay.GetSectionY(chest.y);
2769 if (sectionX == sectionX2 && sectionY == sectionY2)
2770 {
2771 NetMessage.SendChestContentsTo(i, whoAmi);
2772 }
2773 }
2774 }
2775 }
2776
2777 // Token: 0x060002C3 RID: 707 RVA: 0x00041300 File Offset: 0x0003F500
2778 private static void SyncNPCsForSection(int whoAmi, int sectionX, int sectionY)
2779 {
2780 for (int i = 0; i < Main.maxNPCs; i++)
2781 {
2782 if (Main.npc[i].active && Main.npc[i].townNPC)
2783 {
2784 int sectionX2 = Netplay.GetSectionX((int)(Main.npc[i].position.X / 16f));
2785 int sectionY2 = Netplay.GetSectionY((int)(Main.npc[i].position.Y / 16f));
2786 if (sectionX2 == sectionX && sectionY2 == sectionY)
2787 {
2788 NetMessage.SendData(23, whoAmi, -1, null, i, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2789 }
2790 }
2791 }
2792 }
2793
2794 // Token: 0x060002C4 RID: 708 RVA: 0x0004139C File Offset: 0x0003F59C
2795 public static void greetPlayer(int plr)
2796 {
2797 if (Main.motd == "")
2798 {
2799 ChatHelper.SendChatMessageToClient(NetworkText.FromFormattable("{0} {1}!", new object[]
2800 {
2801 Lang.mp[18].ToNetworkText(),
2802 Main.worldName
2803 }), new Color(255, 240, 20), plr);
2804 }
2805 else
2806 {
2807 ChatHelper.SendChatMessageToClient(NetworkText.FromLiteral(Main.motd), new Color(255, 240, 20), plr);
2808 }
2809 string text = "";
2810 for (int i = 0; i < 255; i++)
2811 {
2812 if (Main.player[i].active)
2813 {
2814 if (text == "")
2815 {
2816 text += Main.player[i].name;
2817 }
2818 else
2819 {
2820 text = text + ", " + Main.player[i].name;
2821 }
2822 }
2823 }
2824 ChatHelper.SendChatMessageToClient(NetworkText.FromKey("Game.JoinGreeting", new object[] { text }), new Color(255, 240, 20), plr);
2825 }
2826
2827 // Token: 0x060002C5 RID: 709 RVA: 0x000414A8 File Offset: 0x0003F6A8
2828 public static void sendWater(int x, int y)
2829 {
2830 if (Main.netMode == 1)
2831 {
2832 NetMessage.SendData(48, -1, -1, null, x, (float)y, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2833 return;
2834 }
2835 for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++)
2836 {
2837 if ((NetMessage.buffer[i].broadcast || Netplay.Clients[i].State >= 3) && Netplay.Clients[i].IsConnected())
2838 {
2839 int num = x / 200;
2840 int num2 = y / 150;
2841 if (Netplay.Clients[i].TileSections[num, num2])
2842 {
2843 NetMessage.SendData(48, i, -1, null, x, (float)y, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2844 }
2845 }
2846 }
2847 }
2848
2849 // Token: 0x060002C6 RID: 710 RVA: 0x00041552 File Offset: 0x0003F752
2850 public static void SyncDisconnectedPlayer(int plr)
2851 {
2852 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer(plr, -1, plr);
2853 NetMessage.EnsureLocalPlayerIsPresent();
2854 }
2855
2856 // Token: 0x060002C7 RID: 711 RVA: 0x00041564 File Offset: 0x0003F764
2857 public static void SyncConnectedPlayer(int plr)
2858 {
2859 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer(plr, -1, plr);
2860 for (int i = 0; i < 255; i++)
2861 {
2862 if (plr != i && Main.player[i].active)
2863 {
2864 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer(i, plr, -1);
2865 }
2866 }
2867 NetMessage.SendNPCHousesAndTravelShop(plr);
2868 NetMessage.SendAnglerQuest(plr);
2869 CreditsRollEvent.SendCreditsRollRemainingTimeToPlayer(plr);
2870 NPC.RevengeManager.SendAllMarkersToPlayer(plr);
2871 NetMessage.EnsureLocalPlayerIsPresent();
2872 DebugOptions.SyncToJoiningPlayer(plr);
2873 }
2874
2875 // Token: 0x060002C8 RID: 712 RVA: 0x000415CC File Offset: 0x0003F7CC
2876 private static void SendNPCHousesAndTravelShop(int plr)
2877 {
2878 bool flag = false;
2879 for (int i = 0; i < Main.maxNPCs; i++)
2880 {
2881 NPC npc = Main.npc[i];
2882 if (npc.active)
2883 {
2884 bool flag2 = npc.townNPC && NPC.TypeToDefaultHeadIndex(npc.type) > 0;
2885 if (npc.aiStyle == 7)
2886 {
2887 flag2 = true;
2888 }
2889 if (flag2)
2890 {
2891 if (!flag && npc.type == 368)
2892 {
2893 flag = true;
2894 }
2895 byte householdStatus = WorldGen.TownManager.GetHouseholdStatus(npc);
2896 NetMessage.SendData(60, plr, -1, null, i, (float)npc.homeTileX, (float)npc.homeTileY, (float)householdStatus, 0, 0, 0);
2897 }
2898 }
2899 }
2900 if (flag)
2901 {
2902 NetMessage.SendTravelShop(plr);
2903 }
2904 }
2905
2906 // Token: 0x060002C9 RID: 713 RVA: 0x00041670 File Offset: 0x0003F870
2907 private static void EnsureLocalPlayerIsPresent()
2908 {
2909 if (!Main.autoShutdown)
2910 {
2911 return;
2912 }
2913 bool flag = false;
2914 for (int i = 0; i < 255; i++)
2915 {
2916 if (NetMessage.DoesPlayerSlotCountAsAHost(i))
2917 {
2918 flag = true;
2919 break;
2920 }
2921 }
2922 if (!flag)
2923 {
2924 Console.WriteLine(Language.GetTextValue("Net.ServerAutoShutdown"));
2925 Netplay.Disconnect = true;
2926 }
2927 }
2928
2929 // Token: 0x060002CA RID: 714 RVA: 0x000416BB File Offset: 0x0003F8BB
2930 public static bool DoesPlayerSlotCountAsAHost(int plr)
2931 {
2932 return Netplay.Clients[plr].State == 10 && Netplay.Clients[plr].Socket.GetRemoteAddress().IsLocalHost();
2933 }
2934
2935 // Token: 0x060002CB RID: 715 RVA: 0x000416E8 File Offset: 0x0003F8E8
2936 private static void SyncOnePlayer(int plr, int toWho, int fromWho)
2937 {
2938 int num = 0;
2939 if (Main.player[plr].active)
2940 {
2941 num = 1;
2942 }
2943 if (Netplay.Clients[plr].State == 10)
2944 {
2945 NetMessage.SendData(14, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)num, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2946 NetMessage.SendData(4, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2947 NetMessage.SendData(13, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2948 if (Main.player[plr].statLife <= 0)
2949 {
2950 NetMessage.SendData(135, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2951 }
2952 NetMessage.SendData(16, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2953 NetMessage.SendData(30, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2954 NetMessage.SendData(45, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2955 NetMessage.SendData(42, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2956 NetMessage.SendData(50, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2957 NetMessage.SendData(80, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)Main.player[plr].chest, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2958 NetMessage.SendData(142, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2959 NetMessage.SendData(147, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)Main.player[plr].CurrentLoadoutIndex, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2960 TagEffectState.NetModule.SyncStateIfNecessary(Main.player[plr].TagEffectState, toWho, fromWho);
2961 for (int i = 0; i < 59; i++)
2962 {
2963 NetMessage.SendData(5, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)(PlayerItemSlotID.Inventory0 + i), 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2964 }
2965 for (int j = 0; j < Main.player[plr].armor.Length; j++)
2966 {
2967 NetMessage.SendData(5, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)(PlayerItemSlotID.Armor0 + j), 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2968 }
2969 for (int k = 0; k < Main.player[plr].dye.Length; k++)
2970 {
2971 NetMessage.SendData(5, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)(PlayerItemSlotID.Dye0 + k), 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2972 }
2973 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].miscEquips, PlayerItemSlotID.Misc0);
2974 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].miscDyes, PlayerItemSlotID.MiscDye0);
2975 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[0].Armor, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout1_Armor_0);
2976 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[0].Dye, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout1_Dye_0);
2977 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[1].Armor, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout2_Armor_0);
2978 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[1].Dye, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout2_Dye_0);
2979 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[2].Armor, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout3_Armor_0);
2980 NetMessage.SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(plr, toWho, fromWho, Main.player[plr].Loadouts[2].Dye, PlayerItemSlotID.Loadout3_Dye_0);
2981 if (!Netplay.Clients[plr].IsAnnouncementCompleted)
2982 {
2983 Netplay.Clients[plr].IsAnnouncementCompleted = true;
2984 ChatHelper.BroadcastChatMessage(NetworkText.FromKey(Lang.mp[19].Key, new object[] { Main.player[plr].name }), new Color(255, 240, 20), plr);
2985 if (Main.dedServ)
2986 {
2987 Console.WriteLine(Lang.mp[19].Format(Main.player[plr].name));
2988 }
2989 }
2990 for (int l = 0; l < 1000; l++)
2991 {
2992 Projectile projectile = Main.projectile[l];
2993 if (projectile.active && projectile.owner == plr)
2994 {
2995 NetMessage.SendData(27, toWho, -1, null, l, 0f, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
2996 }
2997 }
2998 return;
2999 }
3000 num = 0;
3001 NetMessage.SendData(14, -1, plr, null, plr, (float)num, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
3002 if (Netplay.Clients[plr].IsAnnouncementCompleted)
3003 {
3004 Netplay.Clients[plr].IsAnnouncementCompleted = false;
3005 ChatHelper.BroadcastChatMessage(NetworkText.FromKey(Lang.mp[20].Key, new object[] { Netplay.Clients[plr].Name }), new Color(255, 240, 20), plr);
3006 if (Main.dedServ)
3007 {
3008 Console.WriteLine(Lang.mp[20].Format(Netplay.Clients[plr].Name));
3009 }
3010 Netplay.Clients[plr].Name = "Anonymous";
3011 }
3012 Player.Hooks.PlayerDisconnect(plr);
3013 }
3014
3015 // Token: 0x060002CC RID: 716 RVA: 0x00041BC0 File Offset: 0x0003FDC0
3016 private static void SyncOnePlayer_ItemArray(int plr, int toWho, int fromWho, Item[] arr, int slot)
3017 {
3018 for (int i = 0; i < arr.Length; i++)
3019 {
3020 NetMessage.SendData(5, toWho, fromWho, null, plr, (float)(slot + i), 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
3021 }
3022 }
3023

3060 public NetSoundInfo(Vector2 position, ushort soundIndex, int style = -1, float volume = -1f, float pitchOffset = -1f)
3061 {

3063 this.soundIndex = soundIndex;
3064 this.style = style;

3069 // Token: 0x06003BBD RID: 15293 RVA: 0x0065B684 File Offset: 0x00659884
3070 public void WriteSelfTo(BinaryWriter writer)
3071 {

3073 writer.Write(this.soundIndex);
3074 BitsByte bitsByte = new BitsByte(this.style != -1, this.volume != -1f, this.pitchOffset != -1f, false, false, false, false, false);
3075 writer.Write(bitsByte);
3076 if (bitsByte[0])
3077 {
3078 writer.Write(this.style);
3079 }
3080 if (bitsByte[1])
3081 {
3082 writer.Write(this.volume);
3083 }
3084 if (bitsByte[2])
3085 {
3086 writer.Write(this.pitchOffset);
3087 }
3088 }
3089
3090 // Token: 0x04006435 RID: 25653
